MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2018 Continued To Nov-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-07-2018 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar May-25-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendants and cross-complainants Jia Kuang's, Ai Wu's and Chef Wang's summary judgment motion is DENIED. The motion is procedurally improper in seeking to adjudicate less than all claims of the first amended complaint and/or the cross-complaint without moving for summary adjudication in the alternative. (See CCP 437c(a),(f)(1); CRC 3.1350(b).) In any event, plaintiff raises triable issues of fact as to the amount of principal loaned. (Lui Dep. pp. 174-75; Lui Dec. 4-6.) This would preclude summary adjudication of the breach of contract and common count claims in the FAC as well as the cross-complaint's usury claim. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to cmply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru

Notice Of Motion For Sanctions And Opposition To Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar May-25-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PO LUI's motion for sanctions under CCP 128.5 is DENIED. The sanctions motion is procedurally improper and substantively unfounded; it was not served 21 days before filing, and defendants' motion for summary judgment was timely and not in bad faith. Order signed. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru
